nasb.text: that all the peoples of the earth may know that the hand of the Lord is mighty, so that you may fear the Lord your God forever.”

esv.text: so that all the peoples of the earth may know that the hand of the Lord is mighty, that you may fear the Lord your God forever.”

cnv.text: 好使地上萬民都認識耶和華的手，是有能力的手，也要使你們永遠敬畏耶和華你們的　神。”

ccb.text: 这是要让天下万民都知道耶和华有无比的能力，要让你们永远敬畏你们的上帝耶和华。”
